Comment: Fully automated retraining: triggered by monitoring/drift_detector.py when input-feature drift crosses the PSI threshold. No human required to complete a retrain cycle - a human only gets involved via the SNS alert (informational) and, per evaluate.py, the model itself still lands in PendingManualApproval status - the ONE deliberate human checkpoint before a new model actually receives traffic.

Parameters.Subject: Retraining pipeline completed
Parameters.Message.$: States.Format('Drift-triggered retrain finished. Check SageMaker Model Registry for a new PendingManualApproval model package if the new candidate beat the current one. Triggered by: {}', $.trigger_reason)

Parameters.Subject: ALERT: Retraining pipeline FAILED
Parameters.Message.$: States.Format('Drift-triggered retrain failed: {}. Manual investigation needed - drift was detected but no new model was produced.', $.error.Cause)
